title: Upon Skrew. Epig.
content:
Skrew lives by shifts; yet swears by no small oaths
    For all his shifts he cannot shift his clothes.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon Skrew. Epig.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
